scripts.typecheck: time tsgo --noEmit -p tsconfig.json #&& time npm run --silent monadcheck-log
scripts.typecheck:watch: nodemon -w core -w src -w test -w tsconfig.json -w package.json -e ts,tsx,json -x "sh -c 'clear && MI=1 npm run typecheck'"
scripts.monadcheck-log: mkdir -p .logs && npm run --silent monadcheck 2> >(node --input-type=module -e "import{appendFile}from'node:fs/promises';for await(const c of process.stdin){process.stdout.write(c);process.env.MI||await appendFile(process.argv[1],c)}" ".logs/$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S%N 2>/dev/null || date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S).monad.log">&2)
